untranslatable_reason: Diamond Bottom pattern detection requires visual/candlestick pattern recognition (identifying the specific diamond shape formation with alternating highs and lows). This cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators and operators. Pattern detection would require either: (1) a dedicated 'diamond_bottom_pattern' indicator not in the allowed list, or (2) complex multi-bar logic with body/wick measurements that doesn't map cleanly to single conditions. The Donchian breakout conditions above represent a reasonable mechanical approximation of breakouts from a support/resistance range, but do not capture the actual geometric pattern.
translation_notes: Signal is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT with equal success rates (36%) for both upward and downward breakouts in bull and bear markets. Modeled breakout detection using Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) as a proxy for range breakouts. Exit conditions use reversal of entry signals (opposite Donchian break). Stop loss set to 5% as conservative estimate given 44% average decline metric. Hold period set to 20 days as reasonable timeframe for pattern completion and exit.
